title: Monster Beverage Completes Acquisition of Bang Energy
text: CORONA, Calif., July 31, 2023 (GLOBE NEWSWIRE) -- Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ: MNST) today announced that its subsidiary, Blast Asset Acquisition LLC, completed its acquisition of substantially all of the assets of Vital Pharmaceuticals, Inc. and certain of its affiliates (collectively, “Bang Energy”) for a purchase price of approximately $362 million, subject to adjustments. The acquired assets include Bang Energy beverages and a beverage production facility in Phoenix, Arizona.

title: Monster Reportedly Approved To Buy Bang Energy Out Of Bankruptcy For $362 Million
text: Bang Energy filed for bankruptcy in October 2022 after a jury determined it had to pay Monster $293 million for false advertising.

title: Monster Beverage: Solid Attributes But A Pricey Valuation
text: Monster Beverage has seen a 14.63% price appreciation over the past year due to strong sales growth and market share increases. The company's products are now distributed in over 140 countries. Despite increased competition and margin contraction, Monster Beverage remains profitable with a gross margin of 50.3%, and an operating margin of 25.1%. The company's Q1 2023 results outperformed expectations. The company's current stock valuation leads to a hold rating, despite its ample growth potential and positive industry trends. A P/E around 20x-25x would be considered reasonable for a buy.

title: Monster Beverage (MNST) Inks Deal to Buy Rival Bang Energy
text: Monster Beverage (MNST) entered an asset purchase deal to buy all assets of Bang Energy, which is battling bankruptcy. The move is expected to be accretive to its growing energy drink portfolio.

title: Monster Beverage to buy Bang Energy out of bankruptcy
text: Monster Beverage Corporation Monday announced an asset purchase agreement with Vital Pharmaceuticals, Inc, in which a subsidiary of Monster would acquire substantially all of Bang Energy's assets, including a beverage production facility located in Phoenix, Arizona, for $362 million.   Monster Beverage noted that while it is hopeful the transaction will be completed there is no guarantee that it will receive Bankruptcy Court approval.

title: Monster agrees to acquire Bang Energy performance drinks and facility in Arizona
text: Monster Beverage Corp. MNST, +0.03% said Monday it has entered an asset purchase agreement with Vital Pharmaceuticals to acquire Bang Energy's performance drinks and a production facility in Phoenix, Az. The deal is subject to the approval of the bankruptcy court.

title: Monster Enters into Asset Purchase Agreement with Vital Pharmaceuticals
text: CORONA, Calif.--(BUSINESS WIRE)--Monster Beverage Corporation (NASDAQ: MNST) (“Monster”) and Vital Pharmaceuticals, Inc. (together with certain of its debtor affiliates, “Bang Energy”) today announced they have entered into an Asset Purchase Agreement (“APA” or “Agreement”) under which a subsidiary of Monster would acquire substantially all of Bang Energy's assets, including a beverage production facility located in Phoenix, AZ (the “Transaction”).
